text: slight reduction but that is all, 2nd week always still there so yet again more pills but usually never completely gone. accupuncture far more effective, within a few weeks gone down, consider that lymph was size of a walnut so that is great news none just not working 7 day course, then repeated as symptoms still remain, eventually after about 4 years of having this they refuse to give any more pills, they say nothing they can do however they checked for glandular fever and such but all clear, this has been ongoing always antibiotics i believe we already tried penicillin but with no joy there,
